channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Donald Trump Praises PM Narendra Modi During Surprise Call at US Embassy Event in New Delhi
item.description: US President Donald Trump made an unexpected live phone call during a gathering organised at the US Embassy in New Delhi, where he publicly praised Prime Minister Narendra Modi and highlighted the str...

item.title: Duke University researchers restore nerve function in chronic pain models using mitochondrial transfer
item.description: Researchers at Duke University School of Medicine have identified a potential new strategy for treating chronic nerve pain by restoring healthy mitochondria in damaged nerves. The study, published in ...

item.title: Democrats elevate Epstein-related allegations as a campaign strategy in the 2026 midterms
item.description: A report from Axios, republished by Raw Story, describes how Democratic candidates and strategists are increasingly incorporating references to the Jeffrey Epstein case into their messaging ahead of t...

item.title: 50,000 Southern California residents evacuated amid concerns over overheated chemical tank
item.description: Authorities in Southern California have ordered the evacuation of approximately 50,000 residents after a pressurised chemical tank overheated at an industrial facility in Garden Grove, located about 6...

item.title: Senior Counsel Muite Challenges Strength of Evidence in Gachagua Impeachment Case
item.description: Senior Counsel Paul Muite has strongly defended former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua during ongoing court proceedings challenging his impeachment, arguing that the evidence presented against him w...

item.title: Super Eagles Welcome More Players As Preparations Continue For Unity Cup Clash Against Zimbabwe
item.description: Super Eagles camp for London don continue to grow as more players arrive ahead of Nigeria’s Unity Cup semi-final match against Zimbabwe. On Sunday, goalkeeper Francis Uzoho, defender Chibuike Nwaiwu a...

item.title: Sydney Morning Herald publishes daily Superquiz and Mini Crossword for May 25 edition
item.description: The Sydney Morning Herald published its regular Superquiz feature for Monday, 25 May 2026, alongside promotion of its Mini Crossword puzzle for subscribers. The article, written by Michelle Stillman, ...

item.title: Chris McCullough explains his return to the Philippines for the PBA season
item.description: The article focuses on the return of import player Chris McCullough to the Philippines as he re-joins the Philippine Basketball Association (PBA) for the latest season. It highlights growing interest ...

item.title: Lenovo, Dell, and HP Commit Major Funding to the Linux Vendor Firmware Service
item.description: The Linux Vendor Firmware Service (LVFS), a platform that allows hardware manufacturers to securely distribute firmware updates to Linux users, has received major financial backing from Lenovo, Dell, ...

item.title: Federalist campaign begins across Alberta ahead of proposed referendum on separation from Canada
item.description: A new campaign aimed at keeping Alberta within Canada was officially launched in Edmonton after Premier Danielle Smith announced plans for an October referendum related to the province’s future in Con...

item.title: Several Residents Abducted After Armed Attack on Kwara Community in Ekiti LGA
item.description: Armed attackers suspected to be terrorists or bandits reportedly invaded the Ikerin/Ajuba axis of Ekiti Local Government Area in Kwara State on Saturday night, causing fear and confusion among residen...

item.title: Orange County evacuates 50,000 residents amid overheating chemical tank at aerospace facility
item.description: About 50,000 residents in Orange County, California, were ordered to evacuate after authorities warned of a potential explosion involving an overheated chemical tank at a GKN Aerospace facility in Gar...

item.title: Marta Kostyuk speaks emotionally after attacks near her parents’ home in Ukraine
item.description: Ukrainian tennis player Marta Kostyuk delivered an emotional public address following renewed attacks in Ukraine that came alarmingly close to her family home. Kostyuk revealed that the strikes occurr...

item.title: Douglas Kanja Launches Probe and Restructures Ruto’s Security Team After Kilifi Incident
item.description: Inspector General of Police Douglas Kanja has ordered immediate changes to President William Ruto’s security detail following a security breach that happened during a public event in Ganze, Kilifi Cou...

item.title: Ramaphosa shows support as Mamelodi Sundowns head to CAF Champions League final second leg in Rabat
item.description: State President Cyril Ramaphosa has publicly extended his support to Mamelodi Sundowns as they prepare for the decisive second leg of the CAF Champions League final against Morocco’s AS FAR in Rabat o...

item.title: India issues travel advisory for Congo, Uganda and South Sudan amid Ebola outbreak
item.description: The Government of India has issued an advisory urging citizens to avoid non-essential travel to the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Uganda and South Sudan following a worsening Ebola outbreak in par...

item.title: PDP concludes Katsina governorship primary, announces winner for 2027 election race
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) in Katsina State has officially announced the winner of its governorship primary election ahead of the 2027 general elections. The exercise was conducted on Sunday i...

item.title: Full soundtrack listing revealed for Netflix sci-fi series The Boroughs
item.description: Netflix’s new sci-fi series The Boroughs has drawn attention not only for its storyline but also for its extensive and carefully curated soundtrack. The six-episode show, executive produced by The Duf...

item.title: China sends Shenzhou-23 crew on key long-duration mission for Moon and Mars plans
item.description: China has successfully launched its Shenzhou-23 space mission carrying a three-member crew as part of its long-term strategy to advance human space exploration, particularly its goal of landing astron...

item.title: Aleardo Villa and the Art Nouveau Posters of the Belle Époque
item.description: Aleardo Villa (1865–1906) was an Italian painter and illustrator whose work became closely associated with the elegance and refinement of the Belle Époque period. He studied at the prestigious Brera A...
